title: Substack vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Substack vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Substack and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. Substack is built for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers monetising directly from subscribers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Substack wins for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Substack or HubSpot?
faq.a: Substack starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to Substack?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
